element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Tournament setting against progressively stronger karate students; builds toward Johnny Lawrence boss
Collected as power-up (C symbol) after defeating groups of thugs; used against Chozen
Collected as power-up (D symbol); also earned through optional challenges (breaking ice-blocks, catching flies, dodging hammer)
Typhoon stage introduces wind that disrupts jump physics; sticks and birds fly through air; can be hit for points but drain energy
Introduced as optional objective in Level 3 (save girl on pole); becomes mandatory win condition in Level 4
Random enemies now require two hits to defeat; spear-wielding enemies require multiple hits; increases damage pressure

element_introduction_order.element: Multi-objective boss fight (defeat boss + protect NPC)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Chozen fight requires simultaneous combat and NPC protection; Kumiko drowns if not maintained nearby; NPC loss = life lost

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating enemy group and collecting power-up (C/D symbols)
Completing optional challenge for bonus moves
typical_tension_triggers: Boss opponent energy bars increasing per fighter
NPC protection mechanic active (Kumiko drowning risk)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Gradual escalation from tournament combat to environmental pressure to multi-objective survival; difficulty ramps through enemy scaling and secondary objectives rather than enemy density

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Obvious and non-obvious entrances/hidden areas where special moves can be earned (ice-blocks to break, flies to catch, hammers to dodge)
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Breaking ice-blocks and dodge-challenges reveal skill move power-ups; rewards exploration and precision timing

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like tournament progression; opponent energy bars increase gradually; introduces basic combat flow
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Level 2-3 introduces special moves and environmental hazards; wind mechanics and flying obstacles add spatial complexity; platforming jumps become 'tricky'
difficulty_curve.late_game: Level 4 combines enemy durability scaling with dual-objective boss fight; must manage both combat and NPC proximity simultaneously; spear enemies add damage variance
notable_spikes: Level 1 final opponent (Johnny Lawrence) after warm-up fighters
Level 3 introduction of typhoon physics affecting jump control
Level 4 Chozen fight requiring simultaneous combat and NPC protection (life-loss condition)

notable_level_patterns.description: Four sequential fighters with increasing energy bars; tournament bracket structure; teaches player abilities before final encounter
Special moves (Crane Kick, Drum Punch) dropped by enemy groups or earned through optional environmental challenges; one-hit enemy thugs mixed with skill-check entrances
Physics modification (wind interference on jumps) and flying hazards (sticks, birds) add passive damage threat; same level structure as Level 2 but with hostile environment

Combines escalated enemy durability (2-hit kills, spear enemies), NPC protection mechanic, and boss fight; failure state is NPC drowning rather than player death; tests all learned skills simultaneously
